name: Calculateur Factorielle
desc: Calculez n! = n × (n-1) × … × 2 × 1. Exemple: 5! = 120. Calculateur gratuit et précis, sans inscription. Obtenez des resultats instantanes avec.
description: Calculez n! = n × (n-1) × … × 2 × 1. Exemple: 5! = 120. Calculateur gratuit et précis, sans inscription. Obtenez des resultats instantanes avec.
seo_description: Calculez n! = n × (n-1) × … × 2 × 1. Exemple: 5! = 120. Calculateur gratuit et précis, sans inscription. Obtenez des resultats instantanes avec.
example_label: Calculate 8! (factorial) for permutation and combination probability problems

range_hints.n: Valid: 0-170; Common: 1-20 for combinatorics; 170 is JS max before Infinity

result_context: The resultat ({resultat}) is n! = n × (n-1) × (n-2) × ... × 2 × 1, representing the number of ways to arrange n distinct items.
mistakes: Entering values above causing JavaScript Infinity
